cover: System architecture diagram: 'Salesforce Event-Driven Architecture at Scale'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Platform Events + CDC + Pub/Sub API'. Subtitle 'Reliable enterprise event delivery from Salesforce API v64.0 to downstream systems'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'Salesforce Producers' (pastel blue): modules 'Apex Transaction', 'Flow Automation', 'External API Publisher'. LAYER 2 'Event Backbone' (pastel purple): modules 'Custom Platform Events', 'Change Data Capture', 'Event Relay'. LAYER 3 'Consumers' (pastel green): modules 'Pub/Sub API gRPC Worker', 'MuleSoft', 'Data 360'. Central node 'Replay + Idempotency Boundary' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER (upper right): 'Kafka Topic' and 'Order Service'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Scale Controls': sub-modules 'ReplayId Store', 'Dead Letter Queue', 'CorrelationId', 'Backpressure' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.
images: Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Platform Events vs CDC vs Pub/Sub API'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Salesforce Event Pattern Selection'. Subtitle 'Choose by business intent, data sync, and external transport'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'Platform Events with megaphone icon', 'CDC with database delta icon', 'Pub/Sub API with gRPC stream icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'BAD EVENT DESIGN' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'GOOD EVENT DESIGN' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: trigger AccountTrigger on Account (after update) { EventBus.publish(new AccountChanged__e(AccountId__c = Trigger.new[0].Id)); }, right column green border '// GOOD' code: EventBus.publish(new Order_Submitted__e(OrderId__c = order.Id, CorrelationId__c = correlationId, EventVersion__c = '1.0'));. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Model business facts', 'Store replay IDs', 'Design idempotent consumers'. Footer bar: 'A field change is not always a business event'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.

Dark blueprint developer infographic: 'Idempotent Salesforce Event Consumer'. Deep dark navy background, glowing neon blue header 'Replay Safe Pub/Sub API Consumer'. Subtitle 'Never advance replay before durable processing'. TOP ROW: 3 horizontal cards — 'ReplayId checkpoint with bookmark icon', 'Idempotency key with fingerprint icon', 'Dead-letter queue with warning icon'. MIDDLE: side-by-side — LEFT red-themed box 'DUPLICATE RISK' with red DANGER pill, RIGHT green-themed box 'REPLAY SAFE' with green SUCCESS pill. CENTER: left column red border '// BAD' code: await saveReplayId(topic, replayId); await createErpOrder(order);, right column green border '// GOOD' code: if (!await seen(correlationId)) { await createErpOrder(order); await markSeen(correlationId); } await saveReplayId(topic, replayId);. BOTTOM: circular avatar 'Bennie Joseph | Architect' + checklist 'Process first', 'Checkpoint second', 'Alert on lag'. Footer bar: 'At-least-once delivery means duplicate-safe business logic'. Monospace font for code, razor-sharp neon text, grid lines.
